ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2006 Off Calendar

Motion To Vacate Sanctions Imposed By The Civil Case Management Department
Off Calendar Nov-30-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Vacate sanctions imposed on 8/22/2006 to Ken A. Lamance, Esq., in the amount of $200.00 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. (212)
